title: Experience the opening story on first load
description: A prospective visitor can open the landing page, experience the cinematic intro, and reach the beginning of the property story with the main presentation visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the opening hero presentation is displayed
Scroll to continue the story
Verify the next major property story section is displayed

title: Scroll through the full property story from the opening
description: Verifies that a user can move through the landing page storytelling flow and reach the later sections without losing continuity.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through the page to continue the story
Verify multiple story sections are displayed in sequence
Verify the presentation remains coherent while progressing through the deck

title: Open the story on a fresh load and reach a business section
description: This test verifies that a user can load the deck from the landing page and immediately reach a core business section, supporting first-session evaluation of the property.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the attractions and entertainment section
Verify the attractions and entertainment content is displayed
Verify the landing page presentation remains usable from first load

title: Jump directly to the retail leasing section
description: A retail tenant can use section navigation to jump straight to the retail leasing content and review the leasing opportunity.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the retail leasing section
Verify the retail leasing section is displayed
Verify tenant opportunity content is visible

title: Explore the attractions and entertainment section
description: This test verifies that a user can open the attractions and entertainment section and see experiential content that positions the property beyond retail.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the attractions and entertainment section
Verify the attractions and entertainment content is displayed
Verify experiential destination storytelling is visible

title: Review event hosting potential in the events section
description: An event promoter can open the events and platform section and confirm the property is positioned for large-scale activations and bookings.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the events and platform section
Verify the events and platform storytelling is displayed
Verify venue and activation potential content is visible

title: Open the luxury positioning section and review premium fit
description: This test verifies that a user can jump to the luxury positioning section from the landing page and see the premium brand story needed to assess luxury retail fit.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the luxury positioning section
Verify the luxury positioning content is displayed
Verify premium brand storytelling is visible

title: Explore the property story by scrolling through the deck
description: A visitor can scroll through the presentation and progressively discover the property story sections without losing the narrative flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to continue through the page
Scroll to continue through the page
Verify multiple property story sections are displayed
Verify the presentation remains coherent as the page scrolls

title: Evaluate tenant mix and growth signals in retail leasing
description: Verifies that the retail leasing section presents the supporting business information needed to assess fit and growth potential.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation control for the retail leasing section
Scroll within the retail leasing section
Verify tenant mix and growth information are displayed
Verify the leasing opportunity can be evaluated from the section content

title: Open the events section and review activation potential
description: Verifies that a user can jump to Events and Platform and understand the venue and activation opportunity for partnerships or promotions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation control for the events and platform section
Verify the events and platform section is displayed
Verify venue and activation potential content is visible

title: Compare the property’s premium positioning with lifestyle appeal
description: A brand partner can move between the why this property, luxury positioning, and dining and lifestyle sections to evaluate whether the destination fits a premium concept.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the why this property section
Click the navigation link for the luxury positioning section
Click the navigation link for the dining and lifestyle section
Verify the dining and lifestyle section is displayed
Verify premium brand storytelling is visible across the sections

title: Move from luxury positioning into dining and lifestyle
description: This test verifies that a user can navigate between premium-oriented sections and continue into dining and lifestyle content without losing the presentation context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the luxury positioning section
Click the navigation link for the dining and lifestyle section
Verify the dining and lifestyle content is displayed
Verify lifestyle and food storytelling is visible

title: Review location access and audience scale in the property overview
description: Verifies that the property overview section presents the location, access, scale, and audience information used to judge the opportunity.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation control for the property overview section
Scroll through the property overview section
Verify location and access information are displayed
Verify scale and audience data are displayed

title: Open dining and lifestyle content directly from the landing page
description: This test verifies that a user can jump directly to the dining and lifestyle section and review it as a destination driver rather than a secondary amenity.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the dining and lifestyle section
Verify the dining and lifestyle content is displayed
Verify dining-focused destination storytelling is visible

title: Open the deck non-linearly and finish with a smooth presentation
description: A stakeholder can browse the deck in a non-linear order, switching between scroll-based discovery and navigation jumps while the presentation stays readable and cohesive.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to continue through the page
Click the navigation link for the why this property section
Scroll to continue through the page
Click the navigation link for the events and platform section
Verify multiple major sections are accessible in one session
Verify the presentation remains smooth and coherent

title: Move between property story sections to compare positioning
description: Verifies that a user can navigate non-linearly between Why This Property, Luxury Positioning, and Dining and Lifestyle to compare the premium brand story.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation control for the property overview section
Click the navigation control for the luxury positioning section
Click the navigation control for the dining and lifestyle section
Verify the premium positioning story is maintained across the section changes
Verify the dining and lifestyle content is displayed

title: Scroll through the landing page story after opening the deck
description: This test verifies that a user can experience the introductory story and continue scrolling through the presentation smoothly to understand the property narrative.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down through the presentation
Scroll down through the presentation again
Verify multiple story sections are displayed during the journey
Verify the deck presents a continuous property story

title: Move from retail leasing to another section of interest
description: A visitor can jump between sections non-linearly and review a different part of the deck without restarting the presentation.

Verify the deck content changes to the new section

title: Move from attractions and entertainment to another section

Click the navigation link for the attractions and entertainment section
Click the navigation link for the luxury positioning section

Verify the presentation remains navigable across sections

title: Continue exploring after reviewing events and platform
description: A visitor can move from the events section to another part of the deck and continue comparing use cases without interruption.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the events and platform section
Click the navigation link for the dining and lifestyle section

Verify the deck remains navigable after section switching

title: Handle direct load of the landing page and continue exploring
description: Verifies that opening the landing page directly still presents the deck correctly and supports continued navigation through the story.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the landing page loads with the opening experience
Scroll through the page to continue exploring
Verify section navigation and storytelling content remain available

title: Read through premium and lifestyle sections in a non-linear path
description: This test verifies that a user can jump between luxury positioning, dining and lifestyle, and attractions and entertainment in a non-linear order while the deck continues to present the expected story.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the luxury positioning section
Click the navigation link for the attractions and entertainment section
Click the navigation link for the dining and lifestyle section
Verify the dining and lifestyle content is displayed
Verify section navigation remains coherent

title: Use section navigation repeatedly without losing context
description: This test verifies that a user can switch between the major sections multiple times and still land on the expected content each time.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the dining and lifestyle section
Click the navigation link for the luxury positioning section
Click the navigation link for the dining and lifestyle section
Verify the dining and lifestyle content is displayed
Verify repeated navigation works consistently

title: Keep the deck usable during rapid section changes
description: Verifies that repeated navigation between sections still leaves the presentation readable and coherent for exploratory browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation control for the retail leasing section
Click the navigation control for the events and platform section
Click the navigation control for the property overview section
Verify the latest selected section is displayed
Verify the content remains coherent after repeated navigation

title: Handle rapid repeated section changes without losing the deck
description: A user can click between section navigation targets repeatedly and still end on a valid section with the presentation intact.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the retail leasing section
Click the navigation link for the events and platform section
Click the navigation link for the retail leasing section
Click the navigation link for the dining and lifestyle section
Verify a valid content section is displayed
Verify the deck content remains intact after repeated navigation

title: Present a stable story across an unusual viewport
description: Verifies that the landing page storytelling and section navigation remain usable when the page is viewed in a smaller browser size.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the browser to a small viewport
Scroll through the landing page
Verify the opening experience is still displayed
Verify section content remains readable and navigable

title: Load the landing page in a reduced-motion-friendly way
description: A visitor opening the landing page on a browser with motion sensitivity can still access the presentation and its core content without the experience breaking.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the landing page content is displayed
Verify the opening story remains readable and usable
